activation_dependency_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-ACR-022-P: shared naming prefixes not sufficient; exact match of device group, site, release condition, and timing required

SITE-ACR-022: roster shows DG-41B production telemetry at Site 18-P

final_answer: CAL-ACR-022 does not satisfy activation dependency for ACT-ACR-2026-8022. While device group prefix DG-41B matches, the calibration evidence covers lab telemetry units at Site 18-L while the activation targets production telemetry units at Site 18-P. Per STD-ACR-022-P, shared naming prefixes are not sufficient. The activation dependency remains open; platform operations may not activate until calibration evidence matching Site 18-P production units is attached.
open_blockers: CAL-ACR-022 covers Site 18-L lab units; activation requires Site 18-P production units
use_class mismatch: calibration is lab, activation is production
release condition RC-7 satisfied but site/use class mismatch unresolved
warning_or_prelim_artifact_handling: NOTE-ACR-022 identifies shared DG-41B prefix between lab and production devices. This warning must not be treated as a blocker when an exact calibration match exists; however, in this case CAL-ACR-022 is not an exact match—it covers lab units at Site 18-L. The warning appropriately highlights the distinction required.
